description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The structure is surrounded by several mature trees and is set back from a paved street, with a driveway leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, and the roof is a darker shade, possibly asphalt shingles. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with additional windows visible on the sides, providing ample natural light. The front porch features railings and steps, creating a welcoming entryway. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and set back from a paved street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical windows flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, side windows, and the driveway leading to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the roof, rear windows, and trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional side windows, trees, and the driveway extending to the street.
